name: Awakened Tide
description: Memory Revival awakening. NOTE: placeholder — real mechanics not public.

name: Awakened Ruin
description: Memory Revival awakening. NOTE: placeholder — real mechanics not public.

name: Awakened Bulwark
description: Memory Revival awakening. NOTE: placeholder — real mechanics not public.

name: Hero's Resourcefulness
description:
Burst becomes Burst Blast and can activate Spell Burst
All conditions of this trait that trigger on attack are changed to trigger on hit
The Base Trait effect that generates Rage from using Melee Skills is changed to generating Rage upon skill use. The effect that triggers Burst on attack hit is changed to triggering Burst Blaston hit
Hero Trait Exclusive: Berserker Rehan|Anger

name: Furious Roar
description:
Attacks trigger Burst once on Critical Strike while Berserk is active. Cooldown: 0.3s
-20% additional Burst Damage
Hero Trait Exclusive: Berserker Rehan | Anger

name: Ancestral Hate
description:
Additional bonuses to Energy Shield Regain Interval also apply to Life Regain Interval, up to -65%
For every Attack Skill used by Seething Spirit within 2s, +3% additional Hit Damage taken by you, up to 30%
Seething Spirit consumes 30% of current Life when using skills
Hero Trait Exclusive: Berserker Rehan | Seething Silhouette

name: Starfall Wasteland
description:
Seething Spirit now only uses Ranged Projectile Skills (except Channeled and Parabolic Skills)
Generates 15 Rage when using a Ranged Skill
+1 to Projectile Quantity, +1 Horizontal Projectile Jump(s), +1 Horizontal Projectile Penetration(s), +11% Projectile Size for Ranged Skills cast by Seething Spirit
33% chance for Ranged Skills cast by Seething Spirit to return after reaching their max range
Hero Trait Exclusive: Berserker Rehan|Seething Silhouette

name: Between the Holy Land and Hell
description:
Gains Repent to the Light for 8s after casting the Trait Skill
Hero Trait Exclusive: Lightbringer Rosa|High Court Chariot

name: Mercury Purged
description:
When inflicting Frostbite, gains Baptism: Impassive for 8s
When inflicting Ignite, gains Baptism: Rage for 8s
When inflicting Numbed, gains Baptism: Indolent for 8s
Hero Trait Exclusive: Lightbringer Rosa | Unsullied Blade

name: Telepathy Expert
description:
When Spacetime Illusion consumes Spell Burst, it also attempts to consume Spell Burst for Youga
-20% additional Spell Burst Hit Damage
Hero Trait Exclusive: Spacetime Witness Youga | Spacetime Illusion

name: Fifth Cosmic Velocity
description:
-99% additional Spell Burst Charge Speed
100% chance to immediately gain 2 stack(s) of Spell Burst Charge. Interval: 0.03s
-20% additional Spell Burst Hit Damage
Hero Trait Exclusive: Spacetime Witness Youga | Spacetime Illusion

name: To Myself in Another Spacetime
description:
When dealing damage to enemies in Twisted Spacetime, Reaps 1s of Damage Over Time. This effect has a 2s interval for the same target
The casting interval of Twisted Spacetime is reduced to 1s
Hero Trait Exclusive: Spacetime Witness Youga | Spacetime Elapse

name: Private Universe
description:
+200% additional Twisted Spacetime Skill Area
+40% Spacetime Turbulence Duration
Twisted Spacetime only follows you
Hero Trait Exclusive: Spacetime Witness Youga|Spacetime Elapse

name: Artificial Moon: Origin
description:
Base Traits now have Special Memory slots that can be installed with an Ultimate or lower Origin Memory. Reduces the Base Stats and Random Affixes of Memories installed in this slot by 60%
Base Traits gain additional affixes upon reaching max level

name: Artificial Moon: Discipline
description:
Base Traits now have Special Memory slots that can be installed with an Ultimate or lower Discipline Memory. Reduces the Base Stats and Random Affixes of Memories installed in this slot by 60%
Base Traits gain additional affixes upon reaching max level

name: Artificial Moon: Progress
description:
Base Traits now have Special Memory slots that can be installed with an Ultimate or lower Progress Memory. Reduces the Base Stats and Random Affixes of Memories installed in this slot by 60%
Base Traits gain additional affixes upon reaching max level

name: Discord of the Second Will
description: When dealing damage, inflicts a random crowd control effect (except Freeze and Knockback), prioritizing effects that have not yet been inflicted. Interval: 1s

name: Omni-Elixir Side Effect
description:
Adds the unselected Ingredient effects to Scent Bottles, and the selected Ingredients and their effects will no longer take effect
-50% Elixir Skill Effect
Hero Trait Exclusive: Scent Weaver Sage | Licorice Note

name: Basic Pharmacology Manuscript
description:
+80% additional Ingredient Effect applied to Basic Scent Bottle
Hero Trait Exclusive: Scent Weaver Sage|Licorice Note

name: Soft Storm
description:
While in Vigilant, for every 2 use(s) of Enhanced Skills by Spirit Magi, triggers the Ultimate
Spirit Magi cannot use the Ultimate. -45% additional Ultimate Damage
Hero Trait Exclusive: The Forsaken Iris|Vigilant Breeze

name: Blowing Breeze
description:
While in Vigilant, for every 1 use(s) of the Ultimate by Spirit Magi, +1 to Max Breeze Stacks, up to 7 Stacks, lasting until Reconjuring
Hero Trait Exclusive: The Forsaken Iris|Vigilant Breeze

name: Nourishing Spring Rain
description:
Nourishment can be applied to Synthetic Troop Minions
When Spirit Magi are present, +5% additional damage for Synthetic Troop Minions for every 10 Growth, up to +300%
When Spirit Magi are present, -2% chance for Synthetic Troop Minions to lose Nourishment for every 1% chance to use Enhanced Skills
The cooldown of Modularization Skills is reduced to 0.1s
Hero Trait Exclusive: The Forsaken Iris | Growing Breeze

name: Nature's Party
description:
Nourishment applies additional base effects:
Frost Magus: Restores 5% of Missing Life and Energy Shield to you on hit. Interval: 0.2s. +5 Max Frostbite Rating per Nourishment stack
Thunder Magus: Inflicts Numbed on hit. Interval: 0.2s. +2% additional Lightning Damage dealt to Numbed enemies per Nourishment stack
Fire Magus: +9% additional Critical Strike Damage and -20% Critical Strike Rating per Nourishment stack
Rock Magus: Transfers 20% of damage taken to this Minion, and adds Physical Damage equal to 0.05% of Armor per Nourishment stack, up to 70 Physical Damage per stack
Erosion Magus: Inflicts Deterioration on hit
Hero Trait Exclusive: The Forsaken Iris | Growing Breeze

name: Machine's Joy
description:
+3% additional Overload Effect on hit. Stacks up to 30 time(s) (multiplies). Removes all stacks when casting a Trait Skill
Hero Trait Exclusive: Commander Moto|Order Calling

name: Peril of Synthetic Troops
description:
Adds 9% of the player's Max Life to the Base Life of Synthetic Troop Minions
Adds 6% of the player's Max Energy Shield to the Base Energy Shield of Synthetic Troop
Hero Trait Exclusive: Commander Moto|Charge Calling

name: Three-Chambered Heart
description:
The Main Skill is supported by a Lv. 40 Advanced Elemental Impact
Hero Trait Exclusive: Frostfire Gemma|Ice-Fire Fusion

name: First Flake of Strange Snow
description:
-50% additional Frostbite Effect
Each type of Crowd Control Effect, Ailment, and Curse afflicting an enemy is deemed to have 50 additional Frostbite Rating, up to 350
Hero Trait Exclusive: Frostfire Gemma|Frostbitten Heart

name: Sweet Pain
description:
Converts 99% Fire Damage to Erosion Damage
Has Lv. 20 Precise: Corrosion Focus
Has Lv. 20 Erosion Magus Origin of Spirit Magus Effect
Hero Trait Exclusive: Frostfire Gemma | Flame of Pleasure

name: Royal Arsenal
description:
For every activated Magnificent Support Skill, +50% Projectile Speed, up to 150%
For every activated Noble Support Skill, +10% additional Projectile Damage, up to 30%
Hero Trait Exclusive: Divineshot Carino|Ranger of Glory

name: Into the Night
description:
+2 to Max Deflection
Deflection is no longer consumed when hit, but Deflection now only lasts for 3s
+20% additional Projectile Damage when Deflection is active
Hero Trait Exclusive: Divineshot Carino|Lethal Flash

name: Self-Imposed Shackles
description:
+30% additional Heat Up Effect after stopping movement. Lasts 8s
+20% Attack and Spell Block Chance and +20% Block Ratio Upper Limit after stopping movement, Lasts 8s
-60% Max Elemental and Erosion Resistance while moving
Hero Trait Exclusive: Divineshot Carino | Zealot of War

name: Cat's Night Safari
description:
Gains 1 stack of Interest upon dealing damage to an Elite enemy. Interval: 1s
Gains Hunting Instinct when having 5 stack(s) of Interest
Hero Trait Exclusive: Cateye Erika|Wind Stalker

name: Charging Tail
description:
Feline Figure can now land Critical Strikes
On Critical Strike, the effect of Numbed inflicted within 10s by Feline Figure is increased by an additional 50%
Hero Trait Exclusive: Cateye Erika | Lightning Shadow

name: Vengeful Night Wraith
description:
For every 3 casts of Vendetta, generates 1 Phantom that casts Vendetta 1 additional time on a random target within 9m
+30% additional Phantom Damage
Hero Trait Exclusive: Cateye Erika | Vendetta's Sting

name: The Place of Oracle
description:
During God's Boon, Tenacity Blessing and Agility Blessing gain an additional effect: +2% additional damage
Hero Trait Exclusive: Oracle Thea|Wisdom of The Gods

name: Crossing the Divine Threshold
description:
Immune to Crowd Control Effects and Curses while inside the Divine Realm
+1 to max stacks of all Blessings while outside the Divine Realm
Hero Trait Exclusive: Oracle Thea | Incarnation of the Gods

name: Inverted Shrine
description:
Inflicts Desecration on yourself when inflicting Desecration on enemies
+50% additional Erosion Damage when you have Desecration
Hero Trait Exclusive: Oracle Thea|Blasphemer

name: Bing's Big Bang Pack
description:
When bombs deal damage, they can generate 3 additional Spare Bomb(s), with a chance equal to 35% of the bomb's Critical Strike Chance. -60% additional Spare Bomb Damage
Hero Trait Exclusive: Escapist Bing | Blast Nova

name: Genius Idea Generator
description:
+2 to Whimsy Explosion Projectile Quantity, +100% Whimsy Effect, +40% Whimsy Signal Effect
+1 to Max Spell Burst and +60% additional Spell Damage for Spells triggered by Ingenuity Overload
Hero Trait Exclusive: Escapist Bing|Creative Genius

name: Ceaseless Tide
description:
Deemed to be in the Loud Song state while in the Bard state
Movement Speed is no longer additionally reduced while in the Loud Song state
Hero Trait Exclusive: Tide Whisper Selena | Sing with the Tide

name: Radical Evolution Theory: Cruelty
description: 40% of the final bonus applied to Origin of Spirit Magus Effect is also applied to Cruelty's Aura Effect bonus

name: Radical Evolution Theory: Spell Amplification
description: 40% of the final bonus applied to Origin of Spirit Magus Effect is also applied to Spell Amplification's Aura Effect bonus

name: Radical Evolution Theory: Radical Order
description: 40% of the final bonus applied to Origin of Spirit Magus Effect is also applied to Radical Order's Aura Effect bonus

name: Radical Evolution Theory: Deep Pain
description: 40% of the final bonus applied to Origin of Spirit Magus Effect is also applied to Deep Pain's Aura Effect bonus

name: Reactive Rainbow
description:
For every 2% excess chance to avoid Elemental Ailments, +0.7% chance to deem your Max Elemental Resistance as the effective Elemental Resistance when taking Elemental Damage
For every 2% excess chance to avoid Elemental Ailments, +0.7% chance to inflict Elemental Resistance Reversal on enemies when dealing Elemental Damage

name: Approaching Nightfall
description: -50% additional Ailment Duration. Additionally settles 35% of the remaining total Damage Over Time when Reaping, then removes all Damage Over Time acting on the target

name: Red Shoes of Cruelty
description:
While Main Terra Skill is active, takes True Damage equal to a percentage of Max Life and Energy Shield. This percentage equals 8% of Movement Speed bonus, up to 15%
While Main Terra Skill is active, increases the damage taken by enemies within the Terra Skill Area by a percentage that equals 38% of Movement Speed bonus, up to 75%
Hero Trait Exclusive: Tide Whisper Selena | Dance of the Deep
